description: Freeze declaration for the DSLO Deterministic Semantic Layered Orchestration v0.1.

immutability_guarantees: no component in v0.1 may be altered
no invariant may be modified or removed
no semantic rule may be changed
no structural layer may be altered
no corpus item may be deleted or rewritten
no mapping or crosswalk may be retroactively changed
allowed_changes_post_freeze: append-only corpus additions in future versions

notes: This v0.1 freeze block finalizes the deterministic semantic substrate and locks all components.
